case_title: WATABE FUKUE et al VS KSK PROPERTY MNGT INC TRUSTEE FOR BUSH AND WALLER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY WATABE FUKUE ZHANG CATHY AS TO DEFENDANT KSK PROPERTY MNGT INC TRUSTEE FOR BUSH AND WALLER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
UNTIMELY SERVICE, NOT DONE 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
